,"\048\099\098\098\115\076\074\109\086\103\053\085\115\083\112\088\110\068\119\077","\110\079\120\101\085\102\069\098","\056\119\069\100\090\049\081\087\101\116\052\089\071\055\070\048\051\055\090\118";"\043\072\048\105\100\102\112\056\057\121\108\076\087\105\076\086\120\115\077\061","\097\054\072\102\074\117\043\051\100\087\071\120","\054\085\082\103\057\047\061\061";"\076\122\098\103\107\057\115\075\076\056\056\081\068\101\115\047\109\071\048\069\065\098\082\061","\070\071\087\067\079\079\047\047\081\050\055\120\072\106\069\113\072\047\061\061","\055\078\104\112\107\089\061\061","\110\122\071\061","\086\080\072\057";"\055\084\055\080\112\112\061\061";"\106\084\086\047\054\049\050\089\057\103\070\097\057\070\051\056\101\115\086\098\111\107\076\077\098\047\061\061";"\118\071\051\076\113\079\088\117\066\068\119\068";"\072\049\099\072\055\047\105\053\119\068\102\079\055\112\061\061","\078\048\043\084";"\088\117\110\053\077\117\065\075\075\047\061\061";"\049\066\054\068\080\122\112\087","\099\097\116\098\089\106\098\067","\101\072\047\073\102\089\061\061";"\112\113\112\067\119\099\108\071\097\112\061\061";"\099\098\071\108\051\088\087\114\070\053\065\104\077\048\087\097\116\078\089\049\049\078\089\061";"\067\072\068\054\051\047\061\061","\051\103\113\109\104\112\061\061","\084\097\111\119";"\087\085\079\099\110\112\061\061","\065\105\047\087\048\043\088\105\097\122\074\061";"\054\090\065\055";"\109\082\113\122\054\104\049\072\118\112\061\061";"\090\098\088\112";"\109\101\109\116\088\112\061\061";"\066\054\122\118\056\104\066\083","\067\122\043\056\098\105\116\113\090\112\061\061","\069\109\101\069\049\069\061\061","\072\053\085\120\075\106\085\084\067\069\061\061","\057\082\051\114\070\084\079\082\117\112\061\061","\067\082\101\120\051\089\061\061","\052\098\097\122";"\072\085\071\082\111\069\061\061";"\099\052\090\115\078\116\050\056","\101\073\098\101\076\047\075\088";"\098\051\071\053\089\073\106\122\112\054\079\101";"\115\053\083\067","\086\101\117\071\111\089\061\ C=function(...)return R(t,{...},v,r)end return C end,function(t,v)local r=m(v)local C=function()return R(t,{},v,r)end return C end,function(t,v)local r=m(v)local C=function(C,X,G,U)return R(t,{C,X;G;U},v,r)end return C end,{},{}return(M(345318+4903099,{}))(r(x))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[v(-596750-(-565964))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
